constraints.description: Compute scaled power demand: colonists * 3 (represents 0.3 panels per colonist, scaled by 10)
constraints.label: Scaled power demand
constraints.name: compute_power_demand

constraints.description: Solar supply must meet power demand (solar_panels >= colonists * 0.3, scaled by 10)
constraints.label: Power requirement
constraints.name: power_requirement

constraints.description: Compute scaled water demand: colonists * 2 (represents 0.02 recyclers per colonist, scaled by 100)
constraints.label: Scaled water demand
constraints.name: compute_water_demand

constraints.description: Water recyclers must meet demand (water_recyclers >= colonists * 0.02, scaled by 100)
constraints.label: Water per person
constraints.name: water_per_person

constraints.description: Food domes must meet demand (food_domes >= colonists * 0.01, scaled by 100: food_domes * 100 >= colonists)
constraints.label: Food production
constraints.name: food_production

constraints.description: Compute total oxygen production: oxygen_ratio * colonists (ratio in tenths of L/day)
constraints.label: Total oxygen production
constraints.name: compute_oxygen

constraints.description: Total oxygen production must exceed safety threshold of 1000 tenths-of-liters/day
constraints.label: Oxygen safety threshold
constraints.name: oxygen_safety

description: Design a self-sustaining space colony by balancing population size against habitat modules, solar power, water recycling, and food production capacity. The goal is to maximize the colony population while meeting all life-support constraints.
name: Space Colony Planning

objectives.label: Maximize colony population for mission viability
objectives.name: maximize_colonists

soft_constraints.description: A landing pad enables emergency evacuation; strongly preferred but not mission-critical
soft_constraints.label: Emergency evacuation capability
soft_constraints.name: prefer_landing_pad

variables.label: Number of colonists in the settlement
variables.name: colonists

variables.label: Number of enclosed agricultural food domes
variables.name: food_domes

variables.label: Whether the colony includes a spacecraft landing pad (0=no, 1=yes)
variables.name: has_landing_pad

variables.label: Oxygen reserve ratio in tenths of liters per colonist per day (5=0.5L, 100=10.0L)
variables.name: oxygen_ratio

variables.label: Reduced solar supply under storm (solar_panels * 7, auxiliary for what-if)
variables.name: reduced_solar_supply

variables.label: Number of solar panel arrays for power generation
variables.name: solar_panels

additional_constraints.description: Compute reduced solar supply: solar_panels * 7 (70% efficiency)
additional_constraints.label: Reduced solar computation
additional_constraints.name: compute_reduced_solar

additional_constraints.description: Under solar storm, 70% of panels must still meet power needs (solar_panels * 7 >= colonists * 3)
additional_constraints.label: Reduced solar efficiency
additional_constraints.name: solar_storm_power

what_if_scenarios.description: Simulate a solar storm that reduces panel efficiency by 30%. Uses push/pop to temporarily tighten the power constraint and evaluate how many colonists the colony can sustain under degraded conditions.
what_if_scenarios.name: Solar Storm Scenario
